chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7446 of 2019 1. For hearing of Misc.No.32854/2019 2. For hearing of main case ----- 20.02.2020 Mr. Nihal Khan Lashari, advocate for petitioner. Ms. Naushaba Haq Solangi, AAG for the State. ------ It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that SHO PS Soldier Bazar and ASI Imran Gujjar have been involving the petitioner and her family members in false criminal cases one after other without any lawful justification, therefore, they to be dismissed from their service, as they have violated their authority. 2. It is contended by learned AAG for the State that the petitioner is having a conviction in her credit at Dubai; she and her family members are habitual offenders and instant petition has been filed by the petitioner only to create harassment for the police officials, as they may not discharge their duty in accordance with law. By contending so, she sought for dismissal of the instant petition with direction to the petitioner and her family members to join the trial before the courts having jurisdiction. 3. We have considered the above arguments and perused the record. 4. If the petitioner and her family members are having a feeling that they being innocent have been involved in criminal cases by the police falsely then they have remedy to prove their innocence by joining the trial before the courts having jurisdiction. No public servant could be dismissed without determining his fault by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed together with the listed application.

No public servant could be dismissed without determining his fault by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed together with the listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
